plan_type_rationale: Rule 6 fallthrough: no strict or phased criteria matched. Scripted re-run of existing CLI tool sequence with no new code changes.
goal: Re-stamp 174 source files on feature/source-headers-dogfood with @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 format by stripping old @semantic blocks and re-running populate-coderef --source-headers, then rebuild graph.json + rag-index and verify chunks > 0

phases.name: Strip + Re-stamp + Rebuild + Verify
phases.description: Checkout feature/source-headers-dogfood, strip all @semantic header blocks from the 174 stamped files, re-run populate-coderef --source-headers to write @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 headers, rebuild graph.json and rag-index, verify chunks > 0, commit and push.

tasks.description: STRIP all @semantic header blocks from the 174 source files (sed/script removes block from @semantic-version through @semantic-generated lines)
tasks.success_criteria: No @semantic (legacy format) blocks remain in any source file

tasks.description: Re-run populate-coderef --source-headers to stamp @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 headers on all eligible files
Rebuild graph.json via populate-coderef (standard populate pass)

tasks.success_criteria: rag-index command exits 0 or chunks_attempted > 0 in output

tasks.description: Commit restamped source headers on feature/source-headers-dogfood
tasks.success_criteria: git commit exits 0; push to origin/feature/source-headers-dogfood succeeds
